channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: >HE BOUGHT AHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA FRIDAY PUMP MONDAY DUMP — 16 replies — 64.0/hr
item.content:encoded:

Open thread • Replies: 16 • Updated: 2026-04-18 12:24 UTC

OP

>HE BOUGHT
AHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA

FRIDAY PUMP
MONDAY DUMP

Early replies (first 3)

62128612
trump lied, bulls died

62128615
>>62128608
Eth must dump!

62128627
The exuberance was getting unbearable

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62128641
>>62128608
iranian demoralization/propaganda. cant believe you fucking doomer retards keep falling for it. the s&p perfectly reflects the reality of current world events. people with far more money on the line probably know more about the situation over there than some neckbeards with a few grand invested in spy lol

62128645
>>62128608
> geopolitical events have anything to do with price movements in the stock market rn
nah miss me with that

62128649
They just opened fire on a ship and the supreme leader said they're at war now. Its safe to say things have escalated. Buy oil on Hyperliquid.

62128657
>he bought in the losers rally
lol, lmao even

cant believe you fell for it

62128665
>>62128608
>he does not make trades by following suspicious market movements
I shit you not, somebody must have bet a billion on the strait being closed like 10 minutes before this announcement.

62128668
>>62128661
Bear King Trump never lets us down.

62128692
>>62128649
Kill
Fuck
Merry

62128693
>>62128608
I just sold all my BTC

62128695
>>62128649
Fuck fuck fuck fuck

62128697
this has happened so many times now, the two sides are obviously coordinating together to pump and dump the market. which means there's no real crisis and it's all fake and gay, they're all on the same team (not yours)

62128700
>>62128608
>monday open
>spy back to 709
the end of the war was promised 3000 years ago and the market has priced in 420 israeli wars and the formation of greater israel, nothing ever happens

62128712
>>62128692
That’s a tough one

item.title: /GRT/ The Graph — 14 replies — 56.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
/GRT/ The Graph

Open thread • Replies: 14 • Updated: 2026-04-18 12:35 UTC

OP

Is it truly over GRTbros?

Will our GRTies ever come back from obscurity? Or is it truly lost?

Early replies (first 3)

62128193
>>62128177
MY GRT GRT GRT MAKES MY FELLOW TRANNIES SQUIRT SQUIRT SQUIRT

62128195
>>62128193
...we deserve the hell we're in

62128200
>>62128195
100% Bitcoin you nigger.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62128202
>>62128200
>100% Bitcoin
That's a surefire way to remain a poorfag

A well placed altcoin bet will always outperform bitcoin

62128208
>>62128202
...like GRT? you dumb fuck

62128224
>>62128208
>...like GRT?
Sure why the fuck not

62128247
It's over wasn't just a meme. If you didn't sell in 2021, you're a retard.

62128257
>>62128247
I did sell in 2021

I'm just thinking it's about time to jump back in

It's probably gonna start rallying up against Bitcoin now

62128260
>>62128177
There is no difference between this baggie and a million other different alt coin baggies. Most alts are going to zero. Sorry not sorry.

62128262
>>62128260
Nah, GRT is built different

62128269
>>62128262
Yes and another 2021 rally is totally coming back again for digital nothing pixels. What makes your ponzi any different from the next ? Kek Baggies.

62128282
>>62128269
I guess we'll just have to wait and see who ends up on top

In about a year GRT will reach 2021 highs and I will be laffin'

62128644
GRT is going to $9.99. GRT, AMP and JASMY are Kek's chosen coins.

62128731
>>62128247
Too red eye, bless up rassclat. Yuns nuh wut da papa be singing! Ya no call dem ‘gaters long mouths till ya pass dem. We booyaka Babylon in due tim mon. Big up ya self natty dreads, when chicken marry, hawk dey near. But I be a broken record. They ai dat web3 wooooooo, faze me. Jah guide.

item.title: >tech is oversaturated >law is oversaturated >medicine is oversaturated >trades are oversaturated >data science is overs… — 13 replies — 52.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
>tech is oversaturated >law is oversaturated >medicine is oversaturated >trades are oversaturated >data science is overs…

Open thread • Replies: 13 • Updated: 2026-04-18 12:23 UTC

OP

>tech is oversaturated
>law is oversaturated
>medicine is oversaturated
>trades are oversaturated
>data science is oversaturated
>academia is oversaturated
>biology is oversaturated
>chemistry is oversaturated
>pharmacology is oversaturated
>IT is oversaturated
>finance is oversaturated
>cybersecurity is oversaturated
>design is oversaturated
>UI is oversaturated
>gaming is oversaturated
>marketing is oversaturated
>communications is oversaturated
>photography is oversaturated
>art is oversaturated
>music is oversaturated
>writing is oversaturated
>'content creation' is oversaturated
>onlyfans is oversaturated
>libraries are oversaturated
>criminal justice is oversaturated
>truck driving is oversaturated
>doordashing is oversaturated
>welfare is oversaturated
>the homeless shelter is oversaturated

Early replies (first 3)

62127924
rum ID

62127927
most of those things aren't oversaturated, they're gatekept for "job security" by dysgenic fucks who sit around with their dick/pussy in their hand at the expense of everyone else
art, design, cybersecurity, many others you listed

these jobs NEED to be done

62127929
it's just only retards are doing them
it's a strange state of affairs, but i think it's dumb/reductive to call everything oversaturated

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62128036
>>62127923
do engineering

62128051
>>62127923
>>trades are oversaturated
No, they aren't. It's just that there are too many illegal spics taking low wages to keep the job

62128055
>>62127924
Yarr

62128075
>>62127923
The warehouse isn't oversaturated, wagie

62128088
>>62127923
Healthcare is not oversaturated you retard. You just dont have the intestinal fortitude to go through the years of training requiring to get licensed and certified

62128096
>>62127923
med is the only true career everything else is shit

you will NEVER be out of a job as a doctor post residency, you could even start ur own private practice and u get paid insane money private and public.

62128164
When you join a fortnite server and there's more than 10 players in it are you like, man this is too oversaturated?

62128176
>>62128096
>We're not in end stage statism, my artificial "career" will surely be safe for the next 40 years
kek

62128708
>>62128096
Nord is the only true career.

62128710
>>62127923
>photography is oversaturated
Kek

item.title: How much BTC you holding right now? — 79 replies — 88.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
How much BTC you holding right now?

Open thread • Replies: 79 • Updated: 2026-04-18 11:43 UTC

OP

How much BTC do you currently have in your wallet, and what’s your target amount to hold before it reaches $1M?

>I mean, if you don’t even have at least 1 BTC and you’re in crypto, it still feels pointless.

Early replies (first 3)

62114988
>>62114930
1.03

ill keep buying as pay cheques come in as long as we stay around the 4 year SMA

ill stop buying when we start running up and instead start selling to buy other assets, probably pay off my mortgage

62115186
>>62114930
i cope with my 5 stack and tell myself in 10 years i'll make it.

62115188
>>62114930
350 BTC or so.

Feels good. I'm living pretty modestly in a $2MM 5000 square foot house in a low cost state. Probably going to build a home gym extension with a sauna and hyperbaric oxygen chamber. Also a small fallout shelter just to be comfy.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62122124
>>62117820
Would be great to see TBVs go live soon. Could really open up more BTC use cases beyond just holding.

62122129
>>62115773
It's kinda enough , you can increase little by little.

62122136
>>62116578
tomorrow, don't worry about it lol

62122141
People are still buying the Epstein Pedo coin? Oof, brutal

62123324
>>62116632
Yeah you can

62123590
>>62122124
I'm not convinced of bitcoin usecases. It's just another promising word spoken

62123601
>>62121442
That's centralized shit

62123609
>>62122141
Hahahaa ngmi

62123784
>>62120210
It’s part of a BTCFi concept around using BTC in DeFi without changing custody assumptions.

62123785
>>62116881
Guess it's about hardwork

62123812
>>62115489
I'll retire early with that money

62123814
>>62123784
Why do you like risking when you can hold only

62123856
>>62115773
Not enough

62123911
>>62121496
Just sell it today bobo

62124101
>>62114930
I hold 0.84 btc at Kraken

62124449
>>62123590
You have a point here tho. The use cases are still early, so skepticism makes sense. What’s interesting is the idea of extending utility while keeping Bitcoin unchanged and kept in self custody.

62124459
>>62116911
>ETH is cool but why LINK?

62124487
2.3 BTC and 36 ETH.

62124590
>>62115225
Giga Chad, I kneel

62124643
>>62117007
His choice lol

62125521
>>62117185
$30k? Let's see if you're right.

62125560
1.4 BTC

It doesn't feel like enough. I'm 36 now, and my dream of living a wealthy and comfy life before the age of 40 is basically done for. Is it even possible to have a fun life at 50+? I really lament not getting into BTC back in 2014. It's not like I didn't know about it back then.

62126507
Is BTC even worth having anymore? Seems to have had pretty shit returns since the covid boom.

62126533
>>62114930
https://timesofmalta.com/article/elusive-bitcoin-founder-adam-back-lives-malta.1126648
What are the financial implications of this?

62126561
>>62123814
What risk are you talking about here? Also, it’s better now that there are returns instead of just holding with no yield. This setup is way better overall.

62126610
>>62117395
but why did you sell?

62126617
>>62117832
buy the bottom? but at which price?

62127919
>>62124487
More!!!

62128353
>>62120218
YOU CAN DO IT BOI

62128654
>>62125560
Don't worry about it. Keep going and have fun. YOLO.

item.title: Hedera (HBAR) — 9 replies — 20.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
Hedera (HBAR)

Open thread • Replies: 9 • Updated: 2026-04-18 12:10 UTC

OP

What went wrong?

Early replies (first 3)

62124523
>>62124464
> posts reddit slop
> doesn't elaborate

It's so cringe it's almost based. Anyway, I still don't know what HBAR does. With other failed shitcoins I sort of have a clue. ALGO is dApps & DiFi (both dead), ICP is Caffeine and muh internet 3.0 (useless Claude wrapper, dead, hosted on Amazon), Sometimes ICP scam-pumps. XRP is FedWire replacement (everyone uses USDT instead). HYPE is exchange on chain iirc (no one cares, DiFi basically). I don't really know what LINK or HBAR do. I am not even joking, something about sergey, oracles, space marines and then something about Lemon and solved trifecta. Like I literally have no clue what HBAR does or who actually uses it.

62125359
>>62124464
well we didnt see bull market that went into 2026. That's the end of it.

62126379
>>62124523
I use HBAR to buy E and pr0n

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62126419
>>62124523
Same here. I heard HBAR is going to boost from Clarity if it ever passes, but I don't know what the fuck it is still.

62127693
>>62124523
Posts like this get me angry.

62128592
>>62124523
Link is easy, pricefeeds. People can argue all they want about if theyre important but theyre there. No idea about hbar tho ngl

62128656
>>62128592
yeah, the price feeds are free to use, you can optionally give them money so they don't shut them down, but if they shut them down, they got nothing, so everyone just freeloads and link marines are paying the tab

62128684
>>62124523
/thread

62128690
>>62124523
>>62126419
>>62128684
Not buying your dead bags

item.title: I have been fired lol — 46 replies — 19.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
I have been fired lol

Open thread • Replies: 46 • Updated: 2026-04-18 10:14 UTC

OP

After 10 years working in a big corpo. I went to my office today and the security guard was there. He didn't let me touch anything and escorted me to HHRR but I already knew what was going to happen.
They didn't give me any reasons. My boss didnt even look at my eyes. They don't want to go to court so they paid me a HUGE severance pay + TWO years of full unemployment benefits (EU country)
And now i'm just here sitting in my living room still processing that after a decade I won't need to wake up early and fight with my bosses and customers anymore. It feels weird.
I probably will take a sabbatical in SEA or something.
Holy shit. It really feels weird.
What would you do /biz/? I honestly dont care about a big gap on my resume and money is not an issue now

Early replies (first 3)

62125619
>>62125608
lol

62125630
What are you good at? Capitalize on your hobbies with seed money from the severance package.

62125698
>>62125630
>Capitalize on your hobbies
>Hiking, filming and traveling.
Oh great i'm going to be a youtuber now.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62126015
>>62125958
Just take some time off, man. No one's going to bat an eye at a one-year gap on your resume, sabbaticals are perfectly acceptable in Europe and you're still young enough to have fun.

62126016
>>62125958
No DESU I'm just literally in your exact situation however I want number to continue to go up instead of number go down. Safe APY is good, BTC is good, trading whatever you feel safe trading is good, and starting businesses is good.

62126026
>>62125608
Plenty of time for investment research. 7 months after I first began looking around I saw a crypto recommendation for a new chain. Then October 2023 happened and everything dipped. It came back from that dip and by 2025 it had become a 10000x. Sure not every year has that kind of opportunity but the point is that it's good to be looking around even if you're not staring at charts of "in the trenches" 24/7.
>SEA
Wherever you go from here but especially there, be sure to look up the history of natural disasters and be prepared for them so you don't end up having to pay even more money due to being unprepared. Pic-related, you never know what's possible. Also, get into growing your own food and having a back-up home. This isn't about an apocalypse, but being prepared for temporary but harsh scenarios. I have a pal who plays games for hours upon hours per week yet still gets more out of his greenhouse than he can eat by himself, so don't shy away due to the initial time investment. Many people throughout history who were well off enough to not have to work, were suddenly hit by economic/environmental disasters and really felt it due to being unprepared. But maybe according to your research and where you live, no such things will happen in your lifetime. The important thing is to look into it.

62126029
>>62125608
Happened to me. I got another job within 3 weeks and got to choose my favorite. 15 years experience C/C++ is pretty employable turns out. Thinking about quitting anyway to go fly airplanes as a second career instead.

62126079
>>62125875


2>5>1>3>4

62126106
>>62125608
That must feel alright. My work time seesaws between 4 months of nonstop all day work and about 4 months off and it feels good to not work for 4 months.

62126110
>>62125608
>losing your job
good
>losing your house
good
>wife leaves you
good
>getting cancer
good

all of these things are good. it will make you stronger. you will come back stronger. I unironically envy you, wish I would lose something important to feed my drive.

62126116
>>62126029
>halo
>fly planes
Reminds me of Joe

62126134
>>62126015
> Europe
Yeah I was about to say, if OP was in burgerland, even a 1 week sabbatical will absolutely destroy your resume and make you permanently blacklisted by ANY hiring company in this abysmal job market.

62126253
>>62126110
Gee thanks siddharta

62126254
>>62126134
Just set your LinkedIn Employment Status to CTO of Stealth Startup. HR still hasn't figured out that means you were actually bug chasing in SEA for a year.

62126303
>>62125608
>2 years pay for getting canned
You better make the most of it you lucky bastard.
>>62125875
I don’t care what you say, I’m still jealous. I know I wouldn’t receive such a nice payout if I was fired. If you don’t at least spend a nice year doing everything you put off, you’ll regret it. Fuck.
-t. wageslave amerifag

62126319
>>62125608
>I probably will take a sabbatical in SEA or something.
GAAYYYYYYYYYYYY
do something more interesting with your life/time holy fuck

nice job though anon
>Holy shit. It really feels weird.
>What would you do /biz/? I honestly dont care about a big gap on my resume and money is not an issue now
depends on other factors

62127314
>>62125875
>>62125887
>>62125917
>>62125952
>>62126079
#4 for me. 4,1,5,2,3 if ranked

62127325
>>62125608
not your personal blog. buy an ad.

62127555
>>62125875
1>4>3=5>2

62127695
>>62125608
if you go back to work and when they ask you what your strengths are, say you beat cancer in your time off work. unless you dont have hipa in your county, or youre a dumbass and use social media they can check

62127798
>>62125608
Goddamn I want this right now so bad. I'm sick of wagecucking in corpo hell and want to NEET so bad. But I can't in good conscience do so until my crapto moons. Stupid ass economy desu. Anyway, enjoy your forced vacation, sounds amazing. Fuck a lot of azn puss for me breh, there's like a billion of them an they all need BWC.

62127804
>>62125608
take the sabbatical mam you've earned it, live your fucking life. Worry about any wagecuck related matter later.

62127836
>>62125608
Nice anon happened to me two years ago and I haven't worked since. Hope you stacked crypto.

62127854
>>62127798
>>62127804
>>62127836
i'm thinking these are glowniggers, maybe israeli

62127857
"you have a tiny dick if you're in the work force, you have to do nothing you should sit in a meat cooler
you can get your muh dick if you stop working, muh dick mhu dick"
i'm so tired of this world

62127860
>>62125875
repeatedly pump semen into 1,2,3,5 while 4 gives you a massage in between

62127863
it is your life, loike i said
i just feel like people work so hard (even without "wagecucking") for such petty bullshit

62127937
>>62125875
2>1>5>3>4 for me
2,1, and 5 all receiving deep creampies multiple tines
3 and 4 blowjobs cum in mouth

62128358
>>62127854
>israelite
fixxed

62128405
>>62125608
kek I did that of my own volition, I had a hit the jackpot on every metric, but idk felt boring af at some point.. just living off savings for over a year now.
I'm just neeting, cooking, gaming, reading, coding, taking the time in the mornings, enjoying life... I should probably think about finding a roastie but let's not kid ourselves.

62128409
>>62125902
who fucking cares, he's in the EU he gets all sorts of gibs if he's actively looking for a job

62128422
>>62128409
Depends on the country but it can be ridiculous yes.
When I was unemployed, The government offered a lot of money to those who accepted to go back to work before unemployment gibs stopped

62128562
>>62125760
You shut your whore mouth. Paul was too pure for this world. And he was NOT jewish.

item.title: Justin Bieber XRP Las Vegas Tangem ZBCN — 10 replies — 16.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
Justin Bieber XRP Las Vegas Tangem ZBCN

Open thread • Replies: 10 • Updated: 2026-04-18 12:00 UTC

OP

Justin Bieber XRP Las Vegas Tangem ZBCN

62128297
>>62128295
>XRP

bullish

62128299
>>62128297
JUSTIN BIEBER ALL IN AT XRP

62128311
>>62128295

62128484
Justin Bieber XRP Las Vegas Tangem ZBCN

62128569
JUSTIN BIEBER HAGGIS SPECIAL

62128609
Who had their assholes stretched open more, Justin Bieber or XRP baggies?

62128614

top signal

62128676

item.title: >short $78,000 >LITERALLY FREE MONEY — 10 replies — 13.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
>short $78,000 >LITERALLY FREE MONEY

Open thread • Replies: 10 • Updated: 2026-04-18 11:51 UTC

OP

>short $78,000
>LITERALLY FREE MONEY

Early replies (first 3)

62126027
>>62125985
cope, nigbear

62126035
>>62126027
CHECK THE PRICE RETARD
IM PRINTING MONEY LOLOLOLOL

62126052
Back in my day the dumps were much bigger

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62126135
We have 2 options:
a) Bear market is over: That would make it the least brutal bear market in history.
b) Bear market is not over and we're going under 65k.

The bullrun was kinda lame so it wouldn't surprise me if 65k was really the botto.

62126165
what y'all doing

62127309
>>62126135
>Bear market is over: That would make it the least brutal bear market in history.
Not really, past bear market lows have been around the second to last bull market highs, so the low was supposed to be at 60-70k.

62127811
>>62127309
The literal most recent bear market didn’t do that you retard. It broke below 20k and stayed below it for months

62128640
Bobos win again :D

62128660
How did OP know it was just a bear market rally and that we're still heading to $40k in October???

62128663
>>62125985
unless you post your position and with size, we dont care NIGGER

item.title: Polkadot - Mumbai Warrior Edition — 66 replies — 9.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
Polkadot - Mumbai Warrior Edition

Open thread • Replies: 66 • Updated: 2026-04-18 05:36 UTC

OP

Hello my fellow PolkaCurry brothers. We are again here, for another thread where we discuss everything related to DOT, Mumbai (the city of DOT), curry and more. The last thread was a resounding success, we managed to keep it alive for literally 41 days. We got paid 11500 + 5*150 = 12250 DOT for the thread and are now living in a period of enlightenment while eating with METAL spoons. Brothers, we have truly reached enlightenment. WE, the Mumbai Warriors will strike yet again and collect generations worth of money !

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

Early replies (first 3)

62115437
We are eating with our METAL spoons in Mumbai. No more hands my brethren. We eat with out spoons, like proud warriors.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62115624
>>62115424
>>62115437

Still gonna larp as an Indian?

62115793
>>62115437

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62121057
>>62119758
Compete against Amazon?

Polkadot better bring any impressive presentation

62121440
>>62121057
>Polkadot better bring any impressive presentation
You do realize that AWS fails multiple times per year and with that it takes down like 50% of the internet? DOT has a 100% uptime. Just simply that one fact makes it superior.

https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2041480013724135847

Having the internet hosted on centralized servers makes no sense. Imagine smart cities hosted on centralized servers and the servers going down. A whole city would simply halt. The reality is that we can't afford down times. We need Web3 cloud to provide a 100% up time. Centralized server simply DO NOT cut it. Every time AWS goes down literally 50% of the internet simply does not work. That's lowkey cooked.

62121668
>>62121440
Great. Name recognition reigns supreme here. Plus Amazon has billions of dollars to address their flaws

62121692
75$ in two years and 5 months

62121723
>>62121668
>Name recognition reigns supreme here
That's great that you pointed that out and at the same time every company sooner or later goes under. There does not exist a company in history of mankind that survived the test of time. No name was ever big enough to sustain itself through time. The only thing that never changes is the fact that everything always changes.

>Plus Amazon has billions of dollars to address their flaws
That's true and the thing is that no amount of money can solve centralized server uptime. There's always something. If you have a system as complex as AWS that's run across multiple countries and relies of tens if not hundreds of millions of lines of code then there's ALWAYS going to be a flaw. It's impossible to have a system as big as AWS, that runs of centralized servers, and that it works all the time. No matter how much money they spent, no matter how many smart engineers they throw at it... The only solution is a Web3 cloud. Can Amazon pivot into a Web3 cloud? Sure. They can literally just use DOT as the underlying infrastructure. DOT is NOT against Amazon. It can compliment it. Amazon can just simply bend the knee and use DOT as their compute provider, right? If Amazon doesn't follow the trend then sooner or later people will abandon it. Why would you use a more expensive cloud provider that has less up time? There is NO point. I as a CS myself know this for a fact. You earlier said
>Name recognition reigns supreme here
To be honest? If I can get a cloud provider for cheaper and have them have more uptime I'd switch in a heartbeat. The same rules don't apply in computers/programming than they do in other sectors. People who are into computers move faster than other sectors, because we're taught BY DEFAULT that things constantly change and never stay the same. If you're paying 5% more and the uptime is 5% less then you're literally shooting yourself in the foot.

62121726
75$ end of race

62121749
>>62121668
What I'm trying to say is that CS is the fastest moving sector for a reason. And the reason is that people in the sector love adopting new technology at a fast pace. If I can get something for 5% cheaper with 5% more uptime and I have the time to migrate my service and it's not too much of a hastle then I'd do it in a heartbeat. Sure if the migration would be EXTREMELY TEDIOUS then I might reconsider. It's just, normally it's not and takes maybe a day or two. Imagine your whole company paying 5% less while your customers would be 5% happier with your service. You'd be stupid not to take that deal, right? Centralized servers ARE EXPENSIVE in nature. Decentralized servers are INEXPENSIVE. Why? Well centralized stuff needs upkeep while decentralized stuff does not. Look at Acurast (https://acurast.com/). They're literally a mobile phone cloud provider. How much does the upkeep for your mobile phone cost? 0$. Do you need janitors and cleaning personnel? Nope. Do you need engineers to run your phone? Nope. Do you see what I mean? The price margin for 1GHz of computing power provided by a mobile device is probably 100x lower than 1GHz of computing power provided by a centralized server. You would switch cloud providers if they offered a 100x lower price while providing a 100% uptime, right? You wouldn't be like "Oh, but their NAME is not AMAZON. OMG OMG. Let's not use this because they have no NAME RECOGNITION. I'd rather pay 100x more and have less uptime than switch. OMG OMG OMG". Do you notice how that sounds once I put it into perspective? Sounds awkward, right?

>>62121692
>>62121726
Soon we shall catapult into the heavens of nirvana.

62121769
>>62121723
> every company goes under
Not quite true. Sure majority do go under, but successful companies adapt to economic changes, merge, or subsidize
Amazon created quite the monopoly in the retail sector. Hard to envision a downturn anytime soon.

>AWS pivots to Web3 cloud
Point taken. There again will DOT have a successful launch once all its compon8 are built in? Will it have enough marketing? Will a new challenger approach?

62121787
>>62121749
Most people would agree Linux is the superior OS against Windows OS

Who still owns the OS space?

Exactly

62121817
>>62121787
>Most people would agree Linux is the superior OS against Windows OS
Great that you point that out. That's an apples to oranges comparison. Linux isn't meant for the average user. It's meant for programmers in a lot of ways. We're also not talking about OS. Are we?

>>62121769
>Not quite true. Sure majority do go under, but successful companies adapt to economic changes, merge, or subsidize
True, and no company survives in it's original form. Everyone adapts to the time. And the time is shifting towards a Web3 cloud.

>Hard to envision a downturn anytime soon.
True, and I'm not saying that. What I'm saying is that Web3 will, over time, take a large share away from it, due to it being cheaper and having more uptime. Again, centralized servers CAN NOT compete with decentralized ones on uptime and cost. And those two factors are literally the only two important factors when it comes to a cloud provider. It has to be cheap and have the largest possible uptime.

>Point taken. There again will DOT have a successful launch once all its compon8 are built in? Will it have enough marketing? Will a new challenger approach?
The thing is that Amazon will just use Web3 clouds. I doubt they'll build their own because they'd have to spent a lot of money to re-invent the wheel. DOT is already ready in a lot of ways. This year JAM hits and that'll transform it into a TRUE Web3 cloud capable of handling the load of AWS. Look, I'm not saying that DOT will IMMEDIATELY kill everyone. It'll be a slow transition and more and more companies will be switching. You know the 20/80 rule? It takes as much time to go from 0% to 20% than it does from 20% to 80%. This was true for smart phones, the internet, cars, ... So, if it took 10 years to go from 0% users to 20% of the population using something then it'll take that same amount of time to go from 20% to 80%. TO BE CONTINUED

62121830
>>62121769
Copied from Google AI

As of early 2026, over 650 million to nearly 1 billion people worldwide are estimated to own or use cryptocurrency. Growth is driven by high adoption in regions like Asia and Africa, with about 6.8% of the global population holding digital assets. While ownership is high, active monthly users are estimated lower, around 30–60 million, indicating a large population of passive holders.

Projected Growth: The number of users is expected to reach 993 million by 2026, with user penetration expected to reach 12.63% of the population, according to 1.
Regional Leaders: Asia dominates with 43% of global users, followed by North America (17%) and Europe (15%).
Top Adoption Countries: India, Nigeria, and Indonesia show high adoption rates, often driven by local currency instability, according to 4 and 3.
User Demographics: Approximately 60% of crypto users are under the age of 34, with a majority being male.

Active on-chain usage continues to rise as mobile wallet installations grow, with over 1.1 billion installations tracked as of early 2026.


We're almost at the 20% mark. BTC was created 17 years ago. So, we'll be at the 20% mark by like 2028 to 2030. So like 19 to 21 years. So, by the year 2050 80% of the world population will be using Web3.

62121862
I'm not sure if you guys are looking at the chart but we're really close to breaking out from the bottom
Look at picrel >>62118020 and >>62118038

62121888
>>62121769
Will it have enough marketing?
No worries my brother. I have made a marketing contract with Jeny Smith (https://thothub.mx/videos/1505023/jeny-smith-polka-dot-pantyhose/). She will market DOT for us. We are set my Mumbai brother

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62121922
>>62121862
I'm not sure if you guys noticed. It's an adam and eve pattern on the 4h chart. Look at picrel

62121953
>>62121862
>>62121922

62122759
>>62121922
>>62121953

Chart looks good

But in the last thread weren't you shorting DOT

62123242
>>62122759
Panjali, be quite you fool (https://boards.4chan.org/biz/thread/61932834#p62069282). Do you want the Mumbai warriors to eat with their hands again? Or do you want to upgrade from our metal spoons to silver and then golden spoons? We, the Mumbai warriors, are painting the graph bullish in order to lure people in, then we strike with a x125 short. We actually been holding short open since 55$. The whole of Mumbai will eat from that singular short. Panjali, you have much to learn about the Vishnu ways. It's ok my son. I forgive you. Together we are strong, divided we are weak.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62124594
>>62123242
Way to promote a project then rug people

62125019
Didint read thread, i Will let My id decide if i buy some DOT when i get home

62125037
>>62125019
w4, E3, Wasb, and purple colour... Yes.. i see...

Not buying.

62125463
this is the most demoralizing dot thread

62126538
>>62124594
>>62125019
>>62125037
>>62125463
Good job my fellow warriors of Mumbai. Thank you for keeping the thread alive with your comments.

>this is the most demoralizing dot thread
How so my Mumbai brother?

>Way to promote a project then rug people
Yes Ganesha. We play the peoples hearts and then we stab them in their hearts.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62126677
Sol 8>297 Is 37X
Dot 1,15 x37= 42

62126931
>>62126538
Holy shit. Are you actually an autistic retard?

62126975
>>62126931
Kamal, are you getting upset again because your mother took away your metal spoon and ate with it? There is plenty of metal spoons for everyone my young warrior of Mumbai.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62127244
>>62126677
Vrishank, that is really good mathematics. Education is really paying off I see. Very good. You might even become a doctor or a lawyer. Yes, you shall reach to the heavens of nirvana one day my young Vrishank. I, Vishnu Kumar, believe in you and so should you my young Vishnu warrior of the mind chain, my young Mumbai warrior, my young metal spoon owner. Soon, we will have silver spoons for everyone, then gold spoon and after that we reach the nirvana of diamond spoons. The whole of Mumbai will eat.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62127673

item.title: Crude Oil — 40 replies — 5.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
Crude Oil

Open thread • Replies: 40 • Updated: 2026-04-18 05:44 UTC

OP

>there was some anon on this Business & Finance board, posting multiple angry posts and crashing out, while arguing in all seriousness, with 100% sincerity, that oil would go to $220
>two hundred united statesian American dollarinos
>there were multiple ESL foreigners posting in agreement, in fact the majority of the thread was anons crashing out

My fucking sides are in orbit. Panicans absolutely blown the FUCK out once again! NEVER gets old!

Early replies (first 3)

62125480
they imploded futures with direct treasury manipulation
the trade got crowded and volatile
the result was inevitable

some people trade without thinking that others also have access to the info they just read online
they don't think "my neighbor could be thinking the same thing"
so they crowd the same sale

62125514
>>62125480
Reeks of cope

/biz/ is just full of retarded brown foreigners, at the end of the day. Very important to keep this in mind when taking any advice from this board. The smartest posters made money and left.

62125548
>>62125514
oil is being phased out
not even by green energy
look at how much GW the United States is building in NatGas power plants to fuel data centers

this was a short term trade
anyone thinking about second, third, forth order effects are completely out of the loop
even the Iraq war made oil spike through a year and resumed dumping after a year
and that had boots on the ground

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62126271
>>62125819
Go for it faggot. $200 in two weeks. Just two more weeks!

>>62125593
>oil didn't go to $_____ b-because... Trump's lying!

cope

>>62125480
>>62125548
The way I see it, you're concurring with me, but you're also making excuses for retards, as if they were ever even on the right track. Their thought process was very simple and very wrong. They didn't get cheated out of a directionally correct trade because it was overcrowded, or because it was a short term trade vs. long term, etc. That's cope. They made (or likely, just talked about making) an emotional trade based off of anger, resentment, and wish-casting. Now that the market has proven them dead wrong, they're coping & seething, and still making excuses for being wrong. See: several posts in this very thread.

62126301
Isn't spot price (which is the real price) $150?

62126316
>>62125389
I voted for this

62126330

62126337
>>62126301
>Isn't spot price (which is the real price) $150?

the absolute state of this board

62126340
wtf is spot price

62126345
actually i don't care i can't afford to trade futures xd

62126355
>>62126301
Where are you getting that number from?
https://www.eia.gov/todayinenergy/prices.php

62126368
more the day goes on the more convinced i am nothing has changed, oil goes back up and this was just more bullshit shakeout to fuck over speculators (me)

62126381
>>62126301
OIL BAGGIE SPOTTED

LEARN THE DIFFERENCE BETWEEN SPOT AND FUTURES YOU RETARD

62126386
I'd still sau it's a 50% chance that the srait gets blocked again over the weekend. I wish i had anything to sell

62126479
>>62126271
Yeah retard, convince us how no matter what, oil isn't going to get more expensive.
Fucking hell.

62126512
>>62126479
Two more weeks. Do the needful, sir. Oil will surely hit $200. Domald Drompf is a pedophile rapist, check out my AI-generated image as proof

62126528
>>62125572
>oil 80
Nobody will sell it to you for 80 it's only future contracts for June. You dumb nigger.

62126551
>>62126528
This cope isn't even funny anymore, it's just lazy bait. Also >>62126301 already did this exact same retard bait, you stupid fucking nigger.

62126554
>>62126355
OK, looks like that was a while ago and just in Europe and not even quite $150 (although close): https://fred.stlouisfed.org/series/DCOILBRENTEU
I was asking because I've seen that number thrown around here.

62126607
>>62126551
This is what the real price is today. Retarded faggot go look at your troon folders now.

62126654
>>62126607
I'm not going to explain commodity futures or WTI to you. You're in my thread, acting like a stupid nigger, on the business & finance board. Go read a book you disgusting pajeet.

62126679
>>62125593
Do you really think oil would skyrocket if it weren't trump tweets?
Im not a pro trader but I also don't think they are this naive.

62126684
>>62126301
Spot has 0 volume, futures is and always has been the "real" price

62126698
>>62125389
when you only have $500 available for stocks gambling, it's very easy to fall into the trap of wishing for crisis scenarios because those are the only ones really providing you with a good opportunity to turn that pitiful amount into something relevant

62126709
>>62125389
Physical oil is trading at extremely high prices of $175+. Oil futures are not physical oil though. The futures market exists to provide a hedge against volatility. If it's trading at $85 on the futures market, that doesn't mean traders expect it to be priced at $85 a barrel in a couple months. It means that they have used the volatility of the past month to stabilize the price at a level that makes it possible to conduct business in a predictable way.

The futures market is a way for major players to plan for the future by pricing in things now instead of taking a risk by buying things at spot prices. It's not a guessing game for degenerate gamblers. If you want to do that then bet on Polymarket.

Don't trade this shit if you don't know what it is.

62126736
>>62126654
>le commodities
They went to Zero during COVID and nothing happened they still charged me money at my local gas station. Now go get your economics book roll it in a tube and shove it in your ass you asian troon loving boomer kike filth.

62126786
Oil is actually at $200
Iran and Trump are colluding to artificially suppress the price
Buy oil while it's cheap and take physical delivery

62126842
>>62126736
>>62126709
>>62126786

Fucking kek. Here come all the retard foreigners with sub-room temperature IQs, crawling out of their hovels like cockroaches, purposely (or accidentally) conflating WTI with [insert cope of choice here]. "SPOT, PHYISCAL, not FUTURES! I AM BUYING OIL AT THE PUMP AND TRADING IT! INDIAN BASKET! OIL IS TRADING AT $1 BILLION, THE PRICE IS JUST SUPPRESSED, SIR! DO NOT REDEEM! IRAN IS WINNING THE WAR, SIR! DO NOT REDEEM!"

62126859
man this really did a number on you poorfags

62127917
>>62126512
How many doses of clot shot did you take for covid, and how many times have to subsequently caught covid in your shitty bot farm?
I hate oil and the fact that our entire society is built on it, but If it doesn't go to $200, when everything else has doubled in price and inflation isn't even started yet, it's because 80% of everyone is dead.
I'm definitely okay with that, because I won't have to read bullshit from bot farm retards like you anymore.
Boost up, and tell us how rich you are.
Kek

62128197
>>62127917
You're mentally ill.

62128213
>>62128197
If being mentally healthy means accepting what's going on in this society as a-ok, then yeah I'm mentally ill.

But at least I'm not retarded enough to fall for 8 months of '2 weeks to flatten the curve for the greater good' as anything other than thee solution to what ails this planet: overpopulation, overconsumption, pollution.
They warned us for 3 generations that something needed to be done, and you're stupid enough to believe they wouldn't and didn't do something about it?

Boost up.
And pretend oil is going out in your drastically shortened lifetime.
2 more weeks, amiright?
Kek

62128220
>>62125480
>muh crowded trade cope
Yeah dude, other people buying what you're buying is fucking terrible, nvidia wouldn't have gone to a 5 trillion market cap if it was too crowded
HAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA

>I guess you’re wasting time, or maybe you just prefer altcoins. What’s your reason?

62087977
>>62087937
I only watch it to laugh at Saylor and you bitsteinbaggies. Not buying digital nothing.

62087993
>>62087937
Waiting for sub60K

62087997
>>62087937
I don't have enough money for it to make me rich. Alts have a good chance of vastly outperforming BTC during the next big pump. I've decided to take the potential for a 10x over the guarantee of a 2x.

62106279
>>62106216
Its quite obvious desu

62106298

>>62097398

there was like 3 alts that outperformed btc out of literally millions. your odds are terrible for alts, much better chance to just throw it all on red and call it a day

62106312

62108172

62109768
>>62097398

You’ll wish you just held the hardest asset instead of playing ETF cosplay.

62110223

62110242
I expected that until December Bitcoin will sunk to below 40k and Solana will be around $20. I will buy solana and Hold it until 2029 when the next bullrun will start.

2027-2028 will be crab market, everyone will say that crypto is dead just like 2023.

I will buy SOL because it will probably 20x while BTC will only 5x.

62110338
>>62102233

62110351
>>62110338

62110380
>>62087937

It literally has perfected digital money.

62112997

62114414

62114891

62117929

62123643

just started, don't sell now

62124465

62124708

I don't see the point now

62124932
>>62087937

62125025
>>62124932
Ah gold
>useless in socialist managed decline as you will not retain asset value when selling, if they don't just confiscate it
>useless in societal collapse as soon as the new civilisation is formed because they will just take it and you won't have more guns or dudes to stop this

62125120

item.title: Let's All Get Rich Together — 19 replies — 4.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
Let's All Get Rich Together

Open thread • Replies: 19 • Updated: 2026-04-18 08:43 UTC

OP

>Gold: World's biggest asset, now worth $33 trillion
>Bitcoin: Was in the top 10 of all assets, peak of $2.5 trillion

And yet nothing happened.

Why?

Because neither of these assets threaten the dollar, or any fiat currency (total market cap of all currencies is about twice that of gold now at its peak)

The plan: We all buy and hold nano (XNO), causing the price to rise and associated interest to grow, with a push for adoption as a currency.

>Why not [my shitcoin] instead of nano?
Nano is the apex currency, both in performance (feeless; fastest settlement ~350ms; lowest energy cost per transaction) and ideologically (fully distributed by the founder for free; no inflation).

It has been around for over a decade and only improved over time, a functional, decentralised, cryptocurrency. If you don't believe me, ask an AI model.

>Won't we get dumped on by each other?
People will sell, but so long as the idea survives, the potential marketcap is still deep in the trillions.

Nothing is more powerful than an idea.

Early replies (first 3)

62118570
HOLY SHIT

By sheer chance I happened to be watching Sunny today, "The gang finds a dumpster baby", and recognised one of the frames Asslarper used (pic related).

In this episode, Dennis (AB's avatar) convinces an activist to CHAINLINK himself to a tree, then LITERALLY cuckolds him.

>A SINGULAR TREE
>THE cuckOLDS OF CRYPTO!

Now do you believe me?

Inverse Assblaster; what did he tell you was useless?

62118587
Wait a minute ... those are the exact same arguments ...

are you saying that ... ?

no ...

62118619
nigga just short oil
let the goyim deal in the real world

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62118645
>>62118570

62118653
>>62118619

you must be 18 to post here

62118695
>>62118568

62118861
>>62118568

62118881
>>62118861

62119564
>>62118568
Holy shit this pathetic broke loser is back.
Seriously dude just end your worthless existence. No one is ever pumping your bags you low iq ape. You were born to slave away at whatever shitty menial job you work at til the day you die.

62120046
>>62119564
Silence, matrix agent! An unemployed schizophrenic is speaking!

62122296
Ready to win, /biz/?

62122884
I said are you ready to win /biz/?

62123845
I CAAAAANN'TTT HEAAARRR YOUUUUUU??

I SAID ARE YOU READY TO WIN, /BIZ/?!

62123950
>>62123845
YES I AM
THATS WHY IM STAYING THE FUCK AWAY FROM NANOO NANOO

62123994
>>62118568
Nano? Nah, no.

62124013
>>62123950
What you don't realise is we're already at the finish line

>>62123994
Yes? Yes, YES!

62125690
Pssst, /biz/

Let's all get rich

62128445
BOOOOOOOOOOOOM

item.title: HoW iS eVerYonE dOinG this? — 104 replies — 4.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
HoW iS eVerYonE dOinG this?

Open thread • Replies: 104 • Updated: 2026-04-17 15:11 UTC

OP

I love watching normie carhag/carfag compilations where Normies complain about how everything is too expensive.

I live on ~24k a year in a HCOL city making $26/hr
>$820 rent utilities included
>free transportation (fare fags aren’t checking train during my commute hours)
>$300/mo groceries (steak and potatoes mostly)
>$60/mo unlimited data
>$15/mo rent insurance
>$30 dental insurance *shrugs*

I regularly spend $8 on coffee, $15 on cigs, $30 dollars on pizza, and I STILL usually dump minimum $1500 a month into my brokerage account. Next month my credit limit will go from 12k>24k when I open another chase CC. I have 6 months expenses in a savings account and the equivalent in dry powder in my brokerage.

Being completely unstressed/concerned about money and whipping out my girthy 12k CL sapphire preferred card on cutie coffee sluts 4 times a week to order my $9 dollar 24oz drum of double chocolate mocha and then ripping a Newport 100 on a comfy bench while i enjoy my coffee is all the pleasure I need in this world

Early replies (first 3)

62107190
It's funny because I'm supposed to be an Europoor but my life standars is better than 99% of Americans lmfao.

I've never heard a single European complaining about debt. But you meet one of those Amerimutts that come to our continent for tourism or to teach English, and 5 minutes into the conversation they will start telling how how much in debt they are. BAFFLING.

62107202
>>62107169
>HCOL city
>$820 rent utilities included
and then your dad stopped molesting you and the out of body disassociation cope ended.

62107317
>>62107169
>>62107190
I'm American. Envious, ungrateful, whiny, bitchy Americans are an embarrassment. It's really not hard to live here at all. The problem is almost every retard that lives here thinks you should be able to afford a 2,300 sqft house on 1 acre of land, while having a new Toyota Camry in the driveway and enough in savings to go on 2 - 3 week-long vacations a year after putting 15% into an investment account, all on a McDonald's wage, or a basic-bitch corporate cubicle job, while only working 30 hours a week (yes, even 40 hours is too much work for Americans now).

Most people live WAY above their means. It's just a mixture of low-IQ combined with a set of personality traits that make them susceptible to short-term thinking and hedonism. Then they beg for free-gibs from the government while producing less material goods and services. It doesn't take a rocket scientist to figure out where this leads to.

I feel zero pity or sympathy for any of these people. Fuck them and their retarded choices.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62119779
OP here, thanks to whoever revived my thread
>>62110818
Good luck family man
>>62111774
Correct bucko
>>62114448
>>62114452
Coping chimp alert
>>62114990
Nope, right here.

Rent is 820 and the rest is on the ole chase sapphire. So I can see exactly what I’m spending. Don’t go too crazy trying to hone in on any particular number for my coffee budget or cigs etc. the bottom line is I spend about 2k a month on everything incl. rent.

It’s a 120sqft “””efficiency””” studio that’s why the rent is so cheap in this HCOL city.

62119791
>>62119779
>Rent is 820
>It’s a 120sqft “””efficiency””” studio
WTF? I mortgage a 1,000sqft house for $1,100/month.

62119962
>>62119791
You probably live in Ohio or one of those “fucking nowhere places”

I live in a city where farting in wine glasses and whiffing it would seem normal

62119967
>>62119962
>I live in a city where farting in wine glasses and whiffing it would seem normal
Skill issue

62120037
>>62119962
>I live in a city where farting in wine glasses and whiffing it would seem normal
New Delhi?

62120104
>>62119967
>>62120037
Alright ALRIGHT fellas listen. Its seattle. Yes, that’s right. I’m rubbing shoulders with tech dorks from Microsoft AND google.

I bet some of them don’t even have a sapphire preferred

62120111
>>62107169
>12k CL sapphire preferred card
Jeets think a 12k credit limit is alot. Nigga, I OWE that on just one of my cards.

62120298
>>62120111
NO WAY WHAT
SHE REALLY IS A HE

62120353
Saving and investing while living with the rents works. Im 34 and I’m damn nearly a millionaire and all I’ve done is be a zogbot and work gov or gov contractor jobs, but I have more liquid assets than friends who went into tech that inflated their COL

62120364
>>62111774
Well then clearly he doesn't live off 24k a year since his expenses alone are more than that. After taxes he's bringing in probably around 48k, and his margin of error for spending is super low. I highly doubt he's being real as a smoking habit would easily eat into any excess funds he has.

>>62119779
>120 sq ft
Ah I see, your memeing that you own nothing and are happy. Makes sense

62120406
>>62112085
Are you old and retarded? You can get a smartphone for like 300 bucks that will last 5 years. And jobs expect you to have them. Your bank uses apps, your job will use a app for timekeeping, you will get emails with paperwork to fill out before end of the day with a digital signature. It is a source of music vs cds dvds and a player, it gets rid of the maps on your car you used to have to buy, you don't need to buy a watch, etc.... literally for 300 bucks. For a device that your will be paying the bulk of the monthly for just a basic phone. Unlimited for me is 35$/month. 3 gigs was like 25$ which is the plan i would use if i had a flip phone. Ffs you can get a free smartphone if you are on ebt. If people took your advice, they would probably end up with shitty assets and the inability to be hired anywhere but starbucks or under the table garbage.

62121038
>>62120406
> Your bank uses apps
Banks do have apps, but you can still do all your banking on a computer.
> your job will use a app for timekeeping, you will get emails with paperwork to fill out before end of the day with a digital signature.
Not my problem. I don't work a wagie job.
> It is a source of music vs cds dvds and a player
Why pay subscription fees for music when I can load up an old iPod with all the music I want and can listen to it all without an internet connection
> it gets rid of the maps on your car you used to have to buy
GPS devices for cars exist. They're often more accurate and lower cost.
> you don't need to buy a watch
Watches are based. Only Zoomers and thirdies think otherwise.
> If people took your advice, they would probably end up with shitty assets and the inability to be hired anywhere but starbucks or under the table garbage.
Ramblings of an illiterate, brain-dead Zoomer who can't imagine life without eight hours of daily screen time on his phone.

62121080
>>62107387
Fucking LARP
I literally live right off MLK way in Seattle and one bed studios start at like $1200 a month. I live in a 2 bedroom that costs me $1900/month before utilities
Either you and OP are bullshitting or you have no conception of what a HCOL city really is

62121133
>>62121080
he's LARPing. you can't even get a studio in a nigger shithole like camden, nj for under $1k a month.

62123272
>>62107190
Yeah but what kind of car do you drive? How is your garbage disposal? Is your refrigerator taller than you are? Do you have a laundry room with washer and dryer?

Americans are retarded but earn more and buy more to debt hard.

62123382
>>62120353
I lived with my father until he died two years ago and now live by myself in the house. it definitely helped me save a lot. I'm 42 and between a taxable investment account, 401k, and cash I am around 1.5. the problem is you have to have no social life for this strategy to work long term. I would trade it all away in exchange for having had a normal social life and a wife, kids, etc.

62123416
>>62120353
Woa man you’re doing great.
>>62121080
Cope I can’t believe a fellow seattleanon would do me like that. You’re making me feel smug as fuck. There are no lies. It’s not a standard studio you dingbat. No stove, no bathtub, yet I’m grateful. Airfrying Chuck steaks and microwaving greens in my silicon steamer thing.

I’m living large pal.
>>62121133
*smuggies multiply*

Don’t seethe guys. I legit found my living situation on Reddit.

Oh and anons? I don’t pay for the 2 line to get to and from work :) I’m actually riding it now. We at Justin’s park
>>62123382
You could still get a SEAbunny wife

62123420
>>62107169
> I live on ~24k a year in a HCOL city making $26/hr
That’s not HCOL lol
HCOL would require $150k plus

62123428
>>62123420
Cope. Only Normie retards need 150k. I’m a friendless loser

62123431
>>62123428
You just said you live in hcol. Being able to survive on 24k means youre not in a hcol area.

62123432
>>62123428
I don’t think you know what hcol or vhcol is. I live in a vhcol area. I don’t need to cope.

62123434
>>62123428
This isn’t about normie or friends. We are clearly focusing on hcol or not.

62123439
>>62123431
>>62123432
>>62123434
Ok ferrets, yes or no: Seattle is a HCOL city. It’s regularly in the top 10

I’m gonna need all of you to go fuck yourselves

62123446
>>62123439
WHERE in Seattle. The ghetto areas?
Each city had vhcol areas then hcol then mcol and etc.
24k is lower class income. And that anon is saying he lives in hcol area. He probably lives in a lcol area in an expensive city. It is like how even LA or nyc had cheap areas.
Like come on man. You’re arguing with me when that anon already said he makes 24k.

62123451
>>62123439
Seattle? Sure, depends on neighborhood. Tf is wrong with you? Youre poor and so desperate to say you live in “muh hcol” city.

62123458
>>62123439
This board is like 10% business discussion contributed by 10% of its posters.
I can’t believe youre even arguing with me AFTER the guy said he makes 24k. Lmao. You make yourself look so stupid and this userbase.

62123461
>>62107169
>newport
are you even white? wtf are you doing on this website. gtfo.

62123464
Your city might have “expensive city” reputation but you clearly live in a cheap area with ghetto people. Assuming you didn’t make a troll thread.

62123466
>>62107190
America is a debt based economy.
You are a cuck based economy.

62125196
>>62123451
Oh be fucking quiet trying to limp along with your shitty point by partitioning up my city into neighborhoods. Holy shit. It’s not even that big. The blacks live in Kent and Tacoma so don’t even start.
>>62123464
No I don’t dumbass I can walk 15 minutes and I’m downtown

item.title: BAT Thread — 33 replies — 4.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
BAT Thread

Open thread • Replies: 33 • Updated: 2026-04-18 05:29 UTC

OP

Are you still there BAT bros? OGs report in. Does anyone still have faith that we will make it?

Early replies (first 3)

62121824
>>62121811
Yikes I haven’t held bat since 2019

62121956
>>62121824
Come home white man. Never a better time to get back in

62122071
Is thotposter still around?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62122103
>>62121956
>white man
>coin entirely dominated by jeets

62122112
>>62121811
Fuck this token. Uphold Wallet is ass!

62122439
>>62122071
>thotposter
Who? This board is hella dead. Actually surprised to see a BAT thread again.

>>62122112
Self Serve has been out for a minute, lad.

62122502
>>62121811
I don't have the image on hand but apparently Kevin Warsh, the incoming fedboi, has lots of crypto, notably SOL, COMP, and BAT lol

62122525
>>62122439
Is the self serve ad db finally out and they only needed 6 fucking years for that? Wow!

62122714
>>62122439
how can men be gay?

62122750
>>62122525
If we're lucky, Brave Search won't fucking suck 6 dicks in a row in 2032.

>>62122714
Good question, lad.

62124615
>>62122750
Why the fuck do Jannie’s exist? Anyone got a copy?

62125490
>>62121811
Makes me sad every time I think about BAT. This time it might be dead for real. Will be lucky to break 50 cents next bull run, let alone 1 dollar

62125502
>>62124615
https://i.warosu.org/data/biz/img/0621/21/1776382087181718.webm
https://i.warosu.org/data/biz/img/0621/21/1776375494543689.webm

>>62122439
Good Lord almighty

62125991
>>62125502
>https://i.warosu.org/data/biz/img/0621/21/1776375494543689.webm
you are extremely based sir ty for saving the thread from the jealous tranny janny

62126864
whats new with bat these days? anything?

62127023
If TP hasnt ditched I would love to see some sweaty thots working out

62127047
BAT is a cursed token
BAT has cursed posters
BAT threads are in turn highly cursed

62127251
>>62127023
>ditched
Probably after this post. I can't be bothered to post in dead threads or ones I've been JanJan'd in. If it picks up I might be active.

I'll make a thread tomorrow night if there's not a fresh one up and this one is dead. OP needs to learn how to bait engagement and that happens to be my specialty. Time to bring back the thotbait BAT threads.
>sweaty thots working out

62127267
>>62127251
jfc thotsie baby nice very nice

62127390
>>62127251
https://i.warosu.org/data/biz/img/0621/21/1776466192395630.webm

who is this goddess

62127412
>>62122439
>thotposter hasnt been heard of
This coin is finished

62127433
>>62121811
Genuinely asking, what is the need for the token? I started using Brave browser in 2022 to get away from popup ads. Still works like a charm. But what do I need the token for?

62127487
Yeah fuck this thread, I'm out. Thanks for not giving me a vacation at least, JanJan.

>>62127267
Glad you liked! Was ready to post some heat, but alas, the new JanJan didn't get the memo.

>>62127412
I'm literally TP, kek.
>This coin is finished
Once I can get around this JanJan, I'm bringing BAT threads back to glory.

>>62127390
Remind me in the next thread. I have a fuck ton of her, but not on this PC. I get flooded with way too much content these days to remember most of the newcomer's names.

62127489
>>62127433
it was supposed to be fucking useful but Brave decided to abandon it.

>>62121811
if i had invested in LINK instead of BAT i would have retired in 2021. fuck Brendan Eich.

62127504
>>62121811
Imagine being a BAT BAGGIE in 2026

I only use brave browser because firefox has memory leaks and because of manifest V3, the moment something better comes along I'm dumping this browser

62127516
>>62127504
>Anna Demi
Good taste.

Brave has some gnarly memory leaks too. Open up YouTube, especially a live stream or a decent length 4k upload and youll see 1GB+ easy in a few minutes. Doesn't happen all the time, but it does pretty often.

62127567
>>62127516
Still not nearly as bad as firefox though, seriously add ublock to firefox and open a youtube video and see for yourself.

62127590
>>62127489
Do they have future plans to eventually make the browser only accessible to BAT holders? I hope this is not the case, but if they do I guess I'll buy some BAT coins.

62127622
>>62127487
got yer back TP
have at it when you can

62127646
>>62127567
yep firefox has been unusable in any shape or form for years now
>>62127590
future plans? the BAT and brave team? mother of all keks

62127806
When will bat niggers just accept that it’s never coming back? I was a believer in Brendan and Luke too and I still use the browser and search engine which are both excellent but bat sucks bbc. If your project isn’t burning profits like HYPE it’s highly likely to never come back. Even dinocoins like ICP have adjusted their tokenomics to burn profits. Now they just need people to use their servers. Bat would’ve cleared $40 this year if Brendan launched an L2 and probably would’ve had something close to what base is now

62127841
>>62127251
What straight man could delete that; for free even.

62128199
>>62127806
BAT? These threads aren't about BAT. Everyone's here to jack off.
